creator: wired.mugen@gmail.com
text:
I have laptop "Acer TravelMate 2350" with celeron 1.4ghz, 256mb ram
Trying instal FreeBSD 6.0 from dvd disk and having this error:

" Fatal trap 12: page fault while in kernel mode 
 fault virtual address = 0xe7dc2
 fault code = supervisor read, page not present
 instruction pointer = 0x20:0xc00e9cc5
 stack pointer = 0x28:0xc102098c 
 frame pointer = 0x28:0xc102098c
 code segment = base 0x0, limit 0xfffff, type 0x1b
  = DPL 0, pres 1, def32 1, gran 1
 processor eflags = interrupt enabled, resume, IOPL = 0 
 current process = 0 (swapper)
 trap number = 12
 panic: page fault
Uptime: 1s
"
i can't get core dump, becouse i haven't any OS on my laptop.
What should i do?
